creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
call of "portupgrade" causes:

/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:117:in `fill': MOVED file format error (PortsDB::MOVEDError)
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:111:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:111:in `fill'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:110:in `open'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:110:in `fill'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:105:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:180:in `new'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:180:in `setup'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgtools.rb:237:in `init_pkgtools_global'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:523:in `main'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/optparse.rb:791:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:231:in `new'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:231:in `main'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2219

How-To-Repeat: call portupgrade
